arts.ttl: Amorim 'doesn't know' if Rashford has played last Man Utd game
arts.sum: Manchester United boss Ruben Amorim casts further doubt on Marcus Rashford's future after his exclusion from Sunday's squad for the FA Cup third-round victory over Arsenal.

arts.ttl: Man Utd knock out Arsenal with 'five perfect penalties'
arts.sum: Watch the full penalty shootout as Manchester United score "five perfect penalties" to knock out Arsenal of the FA Cup and progress to the fourth round.

arts.ttl: Report: ‘Agent-driven’ – Man Utd winger Garnacho’s move to Napoli squashed
arts.sum: Manchester United winger Alejandro Garnacho may not be heading to Napoli after all. Reports were widespread that the Argentine was inching close to a move to the Serie A club but now a report from the Daily Mail has put paid to that idea. The outlet has stressed that it’s believed the speculation is agent-driven. […] The post Report: ‘Agent-driven’ – Man Utd winger Garnacho’s move to Napoli squashed appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Man Utd close to finalising two January exits as Ruben Amorim continues squad overhaul
arts.sum: Manchester United are looking to place a number of their young talents out on loan with striker Ethan Williams among those set to drop down the Football League pyramid in search of more game time

arts.ttl: Mason Mount's perfect five-word response after Man United's FA Cup victory vs Arsenal
arts.sum: Manchester United midfielder Mason Mount has been out of action since picking up an injury in the victory over Manchester City
